title: rosa urbica var. globata
intro: Rosa urbica var. globata, also known as the globular wild rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This perennial shrub is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa urbica var. globata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Rosa urbica var. globata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
